final.title: The solution might be cancelling my AI subscription
final.summary: The solution might be cancelling my AI subscription I find this post by David Wilson very relatable. David lists 16+ projects he's spun up with AI tooling, and concludes: I didn't mean to build most of these things. Usually the Claude session started with something like " write a quick script for X ", and one hour later the result is not a quick script for X , nor in the usual case is my problem solved, whatever the original itch happened to be. final.title: Quoting Karen Kwok for Reuters Breakingviews
final.summary: Anthropic defines “run-rate revenue” in two parts. Use the last 28 days of sales ⁠from customers charged on a consumption basis and multiply it by 13.
